title: Multi-paragraph news article
description: Full news article at sustained pace
text: Scientists in Vienna announced on Monday a major breakthrough in quantum sensor technology. The discovery, detailed in Nature, could reshape medical imaging within the decade. Industry partners are already lining up to license the work.

tips.text: Real journalism: facts + names + dates + flow

tips.target: Scientists in Vienna announced on Monday a major breakthrough in quantum sensor technology. The discovery, detailed in
Nature, could reshape medical imaging within the decade. Industry partners are already lining up to license the work.

character_tips.anna: Real journalism. Sustained 83 WPM across full article.
character_tips.maxim: News articles are the gold standard of prose density.
character_tips.klavochka: A whole story in one paragraph, my sunshine 📰
